steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference in umami intensity: winged kelp has moderate umami while arame has higher umami. The correct choice must contrast these two intensities clearly.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: does not contrast the two seaweeds' umami levels — it either treats them as similar or omits the comparison. ✗
  • Choice B: focuses on a different attribute or reverses the intensity comparison. ✗
  • Choice C: explicitly states that arame's umami is more intense than winged kelp's, directly emphasizing the difference the student needs. ✓
  • Choice D: introduces information unrelated to contrasting their umami intensities. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
